name: io.github.charlie-morrison/indie-founder-mcp
description: Aggregates Lemon Squeezy, Gumroad, Polar, and Stripe revenue into one Claude-queryable view.
title: Indie Founder Revenue MCP

environmentVariables.name: LS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Lemon Squeezy API token (https://app.lemonsqueezy.com/settings/api). Required to enable the LS adapter.

environmentVariables.name: LS_STORE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional Lemon Squeezy store ID filter. Without it, the adapter returns data from every store on the account.
